title: Fit test - both earbuds are disconnected, not possible to start the Fit test [TO BE UPDATED]
scenario: Fit test cannot be started when both earbuds are disconnected because the Test button is disabled.
steps: Disconnect both earbuds from the device.
Open the Fit test feature on the device.
Observe the state of the Test button.
expected: The Test button should be enabled to allow the user to start the Fit test.
